content: We can reframe the ICM curiosity mechanism for 2025 swarm UAV autonomous agents as an inter-agent intrinsic reward system that uses the open Agent Communication Protocol (ACP) to broadcast discovered novel environment states, rewarding individual agents for exploring underexplored regions that the entire swarm has not collectively encountered. This turns ICM's individual intrinsic reward signal can be leveraged to align individual agent curiosity to coordinate swarm-level exploration coverage instead of just individual novelty-seeking, solving the common problem of overlapping redundant exploration in decentralized UAV swarms.
